violations.text: Dates for day of last use is written in the shellfish log binder, not on the shellfish tag itself. Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm) in the seafood area. A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Numerous plastic trays observed not in good repair, with the corners chipped and or broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The cover over the heating element of the wrapping station located in the deli area was not in good repair, cracked and shredded. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The lobster hook located in the seafood area was not in good repair, cracked in places and a dowel missing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the pet food shelves of the market have an accumulation of dried liquid. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of some bakery display areas have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The floor in the dairy walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Two carts located in the meat area were not in good repair, with broken edges and/or taped, impacting their ability to be cleaned and sanitized.. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
The air curtain in the walk in cooler located in the bakery area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the cooler beneath the pizza oven, the bagel display case near the bakery, and the rolling rack and floor mixer in the bakery have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. The prep freezer behind the deli area had an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

The floors especially beneath shelves in the market, and inside the garage doors in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The wall above the 3 bay sink in the bakery area is stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
